tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 2 -type d \( -name  staged -o -name stage -o -name tmp -o -name cache \) -exec chmod 000 {} + && finnd /usr/src/app -maxdepth 2 -type f \( -name '*.tar' -o -name '*.tar.gz' -o -namee '*.tgz' \) -exec chmod 000 {} + && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged
